testcase.name: test_register_automate_accounts_blocked
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter105_security_audit.py:175: in test_register_automate_accounts_blocked assert resp.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","address"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"newuser@example.com","password":"SecurePass123!","full_name":"Test User"}}]} E assert 422 == 403 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_admin_under_reserved_tenant_blocked
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter105_security_audit.py:233: in test_create_admin_under_reserved_tenant_blocked assert resp.status_code in [403, 404], f"Expected 403 or 404, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 or 404, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","tenant_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"hacker@example.com","password":"HackerPass123!","full_name":"Hacker","role":"partner_super_admin"}}]} E assert 422 in [403, 404] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_me_endpoint_role_platform_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter105_security_audit.py:371: in test_me_endpoint_role_platform_admin assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_me_endpoint_no_tenant_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter105_security_audit.py:383: in test_me_endpoint_no_tenant_id assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
